comment: 53yo female, BMI 36 kg/m² (WHO obesity Class II), waist circumference 108 cm (central adiposity), no personal cancer diagnosis. IARC 13-cancer cluster + WCRF/AICR CUP risk profile (CRC, postmenopausal breast, endometrium, kidney, HCC priorities). Engine fires RF-UNIVERSAL-ELEVATED-BMI-CANCER-CLUSTER (universal lifestyle flag) → routes to PreventionPlan: structured weight-loss program (lifestyle + GLP-1 RA / bariatric-surgery discussion per BMI) + cancer-cluster screening cadence modification (CRC adenoma-surveillance individualization, breast supplemental imaging on density, endometrial symptom-prompted TVUS). Validates v0.3 universal lifestyle RF — relevant_diseases=["*"], sidecar documentation only.
